question: Device apa saja yang ada di tabel e-nose tapi tidak ada di tabel object detection?

question: Berapa jumlah transaksi per hari dari kedua tabel digabung?
predicted_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t1.type = 'transaction_enose' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS transaction_enose, SUM(CASE WHEN t2.type = 'transaction_object_detection' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS object_detection FROM (SELECT * FROM transaction_enose WHERE value IS NOT NULL) t1 FULL OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM transaction_object_detection WHERE value IS NOT NULL) t2 ON t1.user_key = t2.device_id GROUP BY detection_time
